data.name: Having a HARD Time
data.detailed_description:
HARD Times Are Coming


You're just an ordinary girl and a sophomore at Wentford University, majoring in Chemistry alongside your life-long best friend. You've been living a fairly carefree life until one day an after class science experiment turns into a freak accident, changing your life as you know it. You're no longer just a girl... you're more than that... much more.



How will you deal with the cards that life has dealt you? How do you respond to these newfound difficulties? And how will your relationships with those around you change from now on? Come and decide for yourself.

Can you handle it?


Get to know the large and diverse cast of characters. Will you be able to figure out the secrets behind their smiles?

Or do you give in to desire?


Surrounded by all these beautiful ladies and gifted with a special tool, how could you possibly resist?
data.about_the_game:
HARD Times Are Coming

Surrounded by all these beautiful ladies and gifted with a special tool, how could you possibly resist?
data.short_description: Having a HARD Time is an erotic visual novel that tells the story of a young girl whose life gets turned upside down after a science experiment goes terribly wrong. Help her deal with the consequences and navigate through a college life filled with tough decisions and a beautiful cast of characters.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 法文, 德文, 簡體中文, 泰文, 日文, 韓文, 羅馬尼亞文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
